# Utah Consumer Privacy Act

Jurisdiction: United States - Utah
Region: US-UT
Citation: Utah Consumer Privacy Act
Authority: Utah Legislature
Source URL: https://le.utah.gov/xcode/Title13/Chapter61/13-61.html
Topics: notice_transparency, sensitive_data, data_subject_rights, third_party_sharing, marketing_opt_out, data_minimization
Keywords: Utah Consumer Privacy Act, UCPA, controller, processor, sensitive data, sale opt-out, 犹他

## Summary
Utah consumer privacy law with notice, consumer access/deletion/portability rights, opt-out of sale or targeted advertising, and controller/processor duties.

## Key compliance obligations
- Provide privacy notice and consumer rights process.
- Offer opt-out for sale and targeted advertising.
- Present clear notice and opt-out opportunity before processing sensitive data.
